; The sale Of the controlling interest
In the Spokane Falls Gas Light COM
pany to Philadelphia and New York
capitalists was announced today by
Isaac w. Anderson Of Philadelphia.
now stopping at the Spokane hotel.
Anderson is an interested party and
came to Spokane to represent the
new owners in the transfer. He ar
rived Tuesday and will remain until
the new company Is organized and
in complete control, probably 80 days.


The deal involves the transfer Of
practically all the stock and bonds OF
the gas company, $4,000 in stock
and $4,000 in bonds. The price paid
for these securities Anderson refused
to divulge.

Anderson said concerning the deal:


Negotiations have been under way
In Philadelphia for some weeks with
the representatives Of the Hopper
estate for a sale Of their interests.
which are about nine-tenths Of the
whole. l was notified Wednesday by
wire that the deal had been consum-
mated.

plant here and to improve and extend
1t as business warrants. We will keep
up in every way with the growth of
